stocks.what_it_does: A mutual fund that invests in 10-15 leading Chinese technology companies listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, with equal weighting and quarterly rebalancing.
stocks.why: The fund is relatively new (inception July 2025) with limited performance history to evaluate, and Chinese tech stocks face regulatory and geopolitical uncertainties. A beginner investor should wait for at least 12 months of track record and clearer market conditions before committing.
stocks.key_risk: Concentrated exposure to Chinese technology sector combined with Hong Kong currency risk and discretionary currency hedging creates significant volatility and regulatory risk.
